slides.headline: Simplify VA school certifying
slides.body: Automate certifications, track compliance, support student veterans.

slides.headline: Streamline Certifications
slides.body: Automate the certification process for VA benefits.

slides.headline: Real-time Compliance
slides.body: Track student veteran compliance in real-time.

slides.headline: Compliance Alerts
slides.body: Automatically notify students and staff of compliance issues.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Ensure student veterans receive the support they deserve.

slides.headline: Effortless Implementation
slides.body: Quick and easy to implement, no training required.

outline.caption: Simplify VA school certifying with VASCO Assistant Pro. Streamline certifications, track real-time compliance, and support student veterans with ease. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Compliance Alerts,' as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to better convey the importance of the feature.
